news.t: Navigating Market Volatility: Nuveen Launches 2 New Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: NUDG is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.39%, Microsoft at 6.97%, Broadcom at 6.30%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.61%, and Amphenol at 3.68%.

overview.description: The Nuveen Dividend Growth Fund ETF (NUDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed equity ETF that focuses on large- and mid-cap companies with the potential for sustainable dividend growth. Holdings are selected based on company fundamentals within economic sectors of the market that have historically provided higher dividend yields. NUDG was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by Nuveen.

data.title: Navigating Market Volatility: Nuveen Launches 2 New Active ETFs
data.text: Nuveen expanded its suite of active ETFs on June 3, introducing the Nuveen Dividend Growth Fund (NUDG) and Nuveen Global Infrastructure Fund (NGIF) on the NYSE. NUDG, with an expense ratio of 0.
